import { createHotContext as __vite__createHotContext } from "/@vite/client";import.meta.hot = __vite__createHotContext("/src/app/pages/platform-admin/CategoryManagement.tsx");import { Fragment, jsxDEV } from "/@id/__x00__figma:react-jsx-dev-runtime";
import * as RefreshRuntime from "/@react-refresh";
const inWebWorker = typeof WorkerGlobalScope !== "undefined" && self instanceof WorkerGlobalScope;
let prevRefreshReg;
let prevRefreshSig;
if (import.meta.hot && !inWebWorker) {
  if (!window.$RefreshReg$) {
    throw new Error(
      "@vitejs/plugin-react can't detect preamble. Something is wrong."
    );
  }
  prevRefreshReg = window.$RefreshReg$;
  prevRefreshSig = window.$RefreshSig$;
  window.$RefreshReg$ = RefreshRuntime.getRefreshReg("/workspaces/default/code/src/app/pages/platform-admin/CategoryManagement.tsx");
  window.$RefreshSig$ = RefreshRuntime.createSignatureFunctionForTransform;
}
var _s = $RefreshSig$();
import { FGCmp } from "/@id/fginspector";
import { useState } from "/@id/__x00__figma:react-base";
import {
  Tag,
  Plus,
  Edit2,
  Trash2,
  Search,
  CheckCircle,
  XCircle,
  AlertCircle,
  Eye,
  TrendingUp,
  Database,
  X,
  Save
} from "/node_modules/.vite/deps/lucide-react.js?v=25293e4c";
import { DOCUMENT_CATEGORIES } from "/src/app/data/taxonomy.ts";
export default function CategoryManagement() {
  _s();
  const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState("");
  const [showAddModal, setShowAddModal] = useState(false);
  const [editingCategory, setEditingCategory] = useState(null);
  const [statusFilter, setStatusFilter] = useState("all");
  const [categories, setCategories] = useState(
    DOCUMENT_CATEGORIES.map((cat) => ({
      id: cat.value,
      value: cat.value,
      name: cat.label,
      code: cat.code,
      status: "active",
      isSystemDefault: true,
      description: `${cat.label} related documents and policies`,
      usageCount: Math.floor(Math.random() * 150) + 20,
      createdDate: "2024-01-15",
      lastModified: "2024-04-15"
    }))
  );
  const filteredCategories = categories.filter((cat) => {
    const matchesSearch = cat.name.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase()) || cat.code.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase());
    const matchesStatus = statusFilter === "all" || cat.status === statusFilter;
    return matchesSearch && matchesStatus;
  });
  const stats = [
    {
      label: "Total Categories",
      value: categories.length,
      icon: Tag,
      color: "text-teal-400",
      bgColor: "bg-teal-500/10"
    },
    {
      label: "Active",
      value: categories.filter((c) => c.status === "active").length,
      icon: CheckCircle,
      color: "text-emerald-400",
      bgColor: "bg-emerald-500/10"
    },
    {
      label: "System Defaults",
      value: categories.filter((c) => c.isSystemDefault).length,
      icon: Database,
      color: "text-blue-400",
      bgColor: "bg-blue-500/10"
    },
    {
      label: "Total Usage",
      value: categories.reduce((sum, c) => sum + c.usageCount, 0),
      icon: TrendingUp,
      color: "text-purple-400",
      bgColor: "bg-purple-500/10"
    }
  ];
